name: Paracetamol 650mg (Dolo 650)
description: Dolo 650 Tablet helps relieve pain and fever by blocking the release of certain chemical messengers responsible for fever and pain. It is widely used to treat headaches, muscle aches, toothaches, and common colds.
dosage: 1 tablet every 4-6 hours as needed. Maximum 4 tablets in 24 hours.

name: Crocin Pain Relief 650mg
description: Crocin Pain Relief contains Paracetamol and Caffeine. It is specially formulated to relieve strong headaches, migraine, backaches, and toothaches effectively.
dosage: 1 tablet every 6 hours. Do not exceed 4 tablets in a day.

name: Amoxicillin 500mg (Novamox)
description: Novamox 500 Capsule is a penicillin-type antibiotic used to treat a wide variety of bacterial infections. It is effective for infections of the lungs, throat, airways, middle ear, sinus, skin, and urinary tract.
dosage: 1 capsule 3 times daily or as prescribed by a physician. Complete the entire course.

name: Metformin 500mg (Glycomet)
description: Glycomet 500 Tablet is an oral anti-diabetic medicine that helps control blood sugar levels in adults with Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus. It reduces glucose production in the liver and improves body insulin sensitivity.
dosage: Usually 1 tablet daily with dinner or as directed by an endocrinologist.

name: Telmisartan 40mg (Telma 40)
description: Telma 40 Tablet is used to treat high blood pressure (hypertension). Lowering high blood pressure helps prevent strokes, heart attacks, and kidney failure. It works by relaxing the blood vessels.
dosage: 1 tablet daily, preferably at the same time every day, or as prescribed.

name: Atorvastatin 10mg (Atorva 10)
description: Atorva 10 Tablet belongs to a group of medicines called statins. It is used to lower cholesterol and to reduce the risk of heart disease. It blocks an enzyme that the body needs to make cholesterol.
dosage: 1 tablet at bedtime, once daily or as advised by a doctor.

name: Benadryl Cough Syrup 150ml
description: Benadryl Cough Syrup provides quick relief from wet cough, dry cough, throat irritation, and runny nose. Formulated with soothing active agents to clear congestion and ease breathing.
dosage: 5-10 ml twice or thrice daily for adults. Consult pediatrician for child dosage.

name: Corex DX Cough Syrup 100ml
description: Corex DX Syrup contains Chlorpheniramine Maleate and Dextromethorphan Hydrobromide. It acts as an antitussive that relieves dry cough, tickly throat, and allergies.
dosage: 5 ml every 6 hours under strict medical supervision.

name: Gelusil Liquid MPS Antacid 200ml
description: Gelusil Liquid provides instant relief from acidity, heartburn, gas, and stomach discomfort. It is sugar-free, works fast, and has a pleasant mint flavor.
dosage: 1-2 teaspoons (5-10ml) after meals or whenever acidity symptoms occur.

name: Sebamed Baby Gentle Wash 200ml
description: Sebamed Baby Wash has a pH value of 5.5 which matches healthy baby skin. It supports the development of the skin's acid mantle and protects against dryness and irritation.
dosage: Pour a few drops into warm water, lather gently on baby skin, and rinse thoroughly.

name: Himalaya Baby Powder 200g
description: Infused with olive oil and almond extract, Himalaya Baby Powder keeps your baby's skin soft, dry, cool, and free from diaper rashes.
dosage: Sprinkle powder onto your hands and apply gently to baby's body after bath.
sideEffects: Avoid inhaling powder. Keep away from baby's nose and mouth.

name: Johnson's Baby Oil 100ml
description: Pure, mild, and gentle baby oil enriched with Vitamin E. Specially formulated to lock in up to 10 times more moisture on wet skin than ordinary lotion.
dosage: Apply gently and massage onto baby's skin before or after bath.
sideEffects: Slip hazard. None for skin if used correctly.

name: Cetaphil Gentle Skin Cleanser 250ml
description: Cetaphil Gentle Skin Cleanser is a dermatologist-recommended soap-free cleanser that deeply cleanses the skin without stripping away natural oils or moisture. Ideal for sensitive, dry, and acne-prone skin.
dosage: Apply to skin, rub gently. Rinse with water, or wipe off with a cotton pad.
sideEffects: Hypoallergenic and extremely safe. Very rare mild burning if skin is broken.

name: Vicco Turmeric Skin Cream 50g
description: Vicco Turmeric Cream is an Ayurvedic medicine that combines the therapeutic properties of turmeric and sandalwood oil. It prevents and cures skin infections, acne, blemishes, and heals minor cuts.
dosage: Apply a thin layer evenly on face and affected areas twice daily.

name: Patanjali Aloe Vera Gel 150g
description: Pure Aloe Vera Gel extracted from organic aloe plants. Rich in vitamins and enzymes, it hydrates the skin, treats sunburn, reduces dandruff on hair, and heals minor burns.
dosage: Massage gently on face, body, or scalp. Let it absorb. No need to wash off.
sideEffects: Rare mild skin irritation for highly sensitive skin types.

name: Dabur Chyawanprash 500g
description: Dabur Chyawanprash is a time-tested Ayurvedic formulation made of 40+ herbs, including Amla, Giloy, and Ashwagandha. It boosts the immune system, improves strength, energy, and respiratory health.
dosage: 1-2 teaspoons daily with warm milk or water.
sideEffects: May increase body heat slightly if taken in excess during hot summer.

name: Patanjali Ashwagandha Churna 100g
description: Ashwagandha (Withania somnifera) is a powerful adaptogen that helps reduce stress, anxiety, lowers cortisol, improves sleep patterns, and enhances strength and vitality.
dosage: Half to one teaspoon (2-5g) twice daily with milk or warm water.
sideEffects: Stomach upset if taken on an empty stomach

name: Himalaya Septilin Tablets 60s
description: Septilin possesses immunomodulatory, antioxidant, anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It is crucial for maintaining general well-being and builds defense against respiratory infections.
dosage: 1-2 tablets twice daily after meals, or as directed by an Ayurvedic doctor.
sideEffects: Safe with no known side effects when taken as per dosage.

name: Accu-Chek Active Test Strips 50s
description: Accu-Chek Active blood glucose test strips are easy to use and provide highly accurate blood sugar readings in just 5 seconds. Designed to be used with the Accu-Chek Active glucometer.
dosage: Insert strip into meter, apply a drop of blood, read results.

name: Sugar-Free Gold 100 Tablets
description: Sugar-Free Gold is a healthy alternative to sugar. Made from Aspartame, it contains 98% fewer calories than sugar and is perfect for diabetics, fitness enthusiasts, and weight watchers.
dosage: 1 tablet equals 1 teaspoon of sugar sweetness.
sideEffects: Not recommended for people suffering from phenylketonuria.

name: Dettol Liquid Antiseptic 500ml
description: Dettol Antiseptic Liquid is a safe and gentle antiseptic disinfectant designed to protect against germs that can cause infection and illness. Ideal for first aid, surface disinfection, and bath sanitation.
dosage: Dilute with water before use. Refer to packaging for dilution ratios.
sideEffects: Skin irritation if applied undiluted on open wounds.

name: WHO Formula ORS Sachet (Orange)
description: Oral Rehydration Salts (ORS) formula recommended by WHO. Restores electrolytes and body fluids lost due to dehydration, diarrhea, vomiting, heat stroke, or heavy exercise.
dosage: Dissolve the entire sachet content in 1 liter of clean drinking water. Drink throughout the day.
sideEffects: Rare. Discontinue if severe facial swelling or hives occur.

name: Volini Pain Relief Spray 55g
description: Volini Spray is a modern pain relief formula. It contains Diclofenac diethylamine, methyl salicylate, and menthol, which deeply penetrate the skin to provide quick relief from muscle spasms, backaches, and joint pains.
dosage: Shake well before use. Spray from a distance of 5cm on the affected area, 3-4 times daily.
sideEffects: Burning sensation if sprayed near eyes or broken skin
